meta.title: Meta Ads acquisition systems for businesses that want predictable growth
meta.description: We build acquisition systems for service businesses, personal brands, and local businesses. More inquiries. More clients. Higher revenue.

hero.subheadline: We help businesses and experts grow inquiries, customers and revenue through Meta Ads systems and automations.

problem.title: Meta Ads don't work when there's no funnel behind them.
problem.body: You have a good product, a team, a real offer. What you don't have is a predictable acquisition system. Most businesses lose money not because the service is bad — but because there's nothing converting traffic into qualified, booked calls.

items.title: Not enough clients
items.body: Lead flow is unpredictable. Some weeks busy, some quiet — no system you can scale.

items.title: Reliance on referrals
items.body: Word of mouth is great until it caps out. There's no second engine.

items.title: Chaotic marketing
items.body: Random ads, random posts, no offer-to-funnel-to-CRM thread holding it together.

items.title: Wasted ad spend
items.body: Meta Ads run to a homepage with no clear CTA, no tracking, no follow-up — money in the void.

solution.title: A predictable client system, end to end.
solution.body: Meta Ads, landing page, lead funnel, conversion optimization and automation — wired together so each booked call has a paper trail from impression to revenue.

steps.label: Attention
steps.title: Meta Ads that stop the scroll
steps.body: Founder videos, pain-based hooks, case-study creatives — tested in tight cohorts, scaled when CPL drops.

steps.label: Conviction
steps.title: Landing page that converts
steps.body: Hero, problem, solution, case studies, offer, FAQ, CTA — every section earns its place, every CTA goes to a booked call.

steps.label: Conversion
steps.title: Call funnel that closes
steps.body: Qualification, problem diagnosis, vision, solution, offer close — a repeatable conversation that turns calls into clients.

caseStudies.title: Numbers that move when the system runs.
caseStudies.body: Indicative results from acquisition systems we've architected. Replace these with your own once your case studies are in.

items.note: Pain-based creatives + tightened landing page hero.

testimonials.title: Operators who stopped relying on luck.
testimonials.body: Three operators, three industries, one acquisition stack underneath.

items.name: Iva
items.quote: Within sixty days we knew which channel was paying for itself. The funnel and the dashboard turned guesswork into a P&L line we could defend.

items.name: Mariya
items.quote: We stopped depending on word-of-mouth weeks. The calendar finally shows steady growth instead of gaps, and the team can plan the floor around it.

items.name: Pavel
items.quote: The call funnel filters out tire-kickers before they ever hit my calendar. I show up to qualified conversations only — that's what changed everything.

offer.title: We own the full acquisition stack.
offer.body: Six modules, one accountable team. No agency-of-record overhead, no scope ping-pong.

modules.title: Funnel strategy
modules.body: Offer, positioning, angle, CTA, lead flow.

modules.title: Website / landing page
modules.body: High-converting LP, mobile optimization, booking and form optimization.

modules.title: Meta Ads
modules.body: Campaign setup, creatives, copy, retargeting, optimization.

modules.title: Scaling
modules.body: KPI tracking, CAC optimization, ROAS scaling.

modules.title: AI layer
modules.body: Lead scoring, auto-qualification, automated follow-up drafts.

steps.label: Week 0–1
steps.title: Foundation
steps.body: Offer, positioning, tracking, CRM, landing page draft.

steps.label: Week 1–2
steps.title: Creative production
steps.body: 5–10 ad creatives — founder, case-study, pain, authority.

steps.label: Week 2–3
steps.title: Campaign launch
steps.body: Cold testing, retargeting, live KPI dashboard.

steps.label: Week 3+
steps.title: Optimize and scale
steps.body: Kill weak creatives, scale winners, optimize funnel CVR.

items.a: Engagements start at €3.5k/month management + a one-time foundation fee for landing page, tracking and CRM. Ad spend is separate and stays in your account.

items.q: How long until we see results?
items.a: First booked calls usually land in week 2–3. Stable CPL and predictable lead flow typically settles by week 4–6 once we have enough data to optimize.
We guarantee the process and the system. We don't guarantee specific numbers — anyone who does is misleading you. We do offer a 60-day work-with-us-until-it-works window for qualified accounts.

items.q: Who owns the ad account, pixel, CRM?
items.a: You do. Always. We work inside your assets. If we part ways, everything stays with you.
Async via Slack or Telegram, weekly live calls, monthly KPI review. You get a live dashboard for CPL, CVR, CAC, ROAS.

items.q: Do you work with our industry?
items.a: Service businesses, personal brands, local businesses, high-ticket experts. If you have a real offer and capacity to fulfill — we can probably help. If you're pre-product, we're not the right fit.

finalCta.title: Predictable growth starts with one call.
finalCta.body: 30 minutes. We audit your current funnel and tell you exactly what would move the needle first — whether you work with us or not.
finalCta.trust: No deck. No pitch. A working audit you can keep.

leadForm.title: Get a free funnel audit
leadForm.body: Tell us about your business. We'll come back within 24 hours with a written audit of your acquisition system and the highest-leverage fix.
leadForm.success: Got it. Audit on the way within 24 hours.
leadForm.error: Something went wrong. Try again or email us at hello@newagecontent.com.
leadForm.consent: By submitting, you agree to be contacted about your funnel audit.

booking.title: Or book the call directly
booking.body: Pick a 30-minute slot that works for you. Free audit, no pitch deck.
booking.fallback: Calendly isn't connected yet. Use the form on this page or email hello@newagecontent.com to book your call.
